data_freshness.source: portfolio_snapshots row 18 (LTPs marked at 13:48:34); no 14:00 live mark was available, so figures below are based on the 13:48 snapshot. Today's trades table remains empty — zero strategy decisions logged since 2026-04-22 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR submission (cumulative silence now ~23h45m, ~4h45m post-open Day 2).

order_book_state.note: Order book remains EMPTY (no OPEN, no PENDING) — sixth consecutive tick with this state (12:00, 12:17, 12:30, 12:48, 13:17, 13:48). Zero new BUY submissions in ~4h45m of Day-2 trading. Cash unchanged at ₹214,415.50 for the 6th consecutive tick.

trigger_e_PRIORITY_mahabank_below_neg_5_.note: MAHABANK RESUMED DETERIORATION: -4.66% (13:17) → -4.91% (13:48), a -25 bps move that fully unwound yesterday's +10 bps recovery and set a FRESH DAY LOW (prior low was -4.76% at 12:48). Now only 9 bps from the -5% hard trigger — by far the closest proximity of the day. Day trajectory: -2.15% → -2.98% → -3.10% → -3.73% → -3.68% → -3.07% → -3.47% → -4.76% → -4.66% → -4.91% (ten marks). Mark-to-market loss now -₹4,800 on 9.30% of capital. The spec-hard trigger for default_sl_pct tightening is -5.00% BREACH — not fired this tick by 9 bps. Holding the line on spec discipline, but flagging this as by far the highest-probability fire candidate for the 14:30 tick.

trigger_reset_mahabank_recovered_above_n.note: Reset condition NOT met; MAHABANK moved AWAY from reset by 25 bps this tick. Remains firmly in the priority-watch band (-5% to -4%), now pressed against the hard trigger edge.

trigger_a_unrealized_below_neg_1_pct.note: Book FLIPPED POSITIVE: -₹269 (13:17) → +₹233 (13:48), a +₹502 swing. This is the SECOND positive mark of the day (first was +₹683 at 12:17) and the net tick delta continues the 13:17 partial-recovery trajectory. Notable: the positive swing happened DESPITE MAHABANK deteriorating -₹240 — the offsetting gains were broad-based (8 of 10 holdings green this tick, led by GRANULES +₹266 / HINDUNILVR +₹106 / ADANIPOWER +₹101). 1023 bps buffer to the -1% findings trigger; 3024 bps to the -3% loss gate. Not fired.

trigger_b_strategy_first_sell_or_exit.status: Still ZERO SELL, ZERO MODIFY, ZERO new BUY since 2026-04-22 14:13:33. Strategy-layer silence now 4h45m post-open on Day 2 (~23h45m cumulative). AUBANK at-cost-plus exit window extends to +0.66% (from +0.62% at 13:17) — widest of the day. TORNTPOWER +3.28% also extended (from +3.22%). PNBHOUSING +1.95% (slightly off 13:17's +1.98%). GRANULES broke to +1.02% this tick (from +0.46% at 13:17) — a fresh at-cost-plus window. Four concrete trim candidates unacted on.

trigger_c_new_buy_despite_deployment_cap.status: No new BUY activity. The 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap remains binding against any admission given 78.56% deployment.

trigger_d_bfsi_climbs_above_0_37.note: BFSI share drifted DOWN 4 bps tick-over-tick (35.94% → 35.90%) on MAHABANK's weakening offsetting modest AUBANK gains. 1.10 pp buffer to the 37% trigger. Not fired.

trigger_f_ESCALATED_strategy_stall.status: REMAINS HARD-CROSSED: 4h45m post-open on Day 2. 30 minutes to the 5-hour tertiary escalation threshold at 14:15 IST. Per 13:30 spec: non-numeric-lever — remains a persistent Day-2 EOD audit line item for strategy_reviewer.

trigger_g_power_cluster_above_0_20_of_ca.note: Power cluster FLAT at 16.14% of capital (0 bps delta); deployed basis +1 bps to 20.55%. 3.86 pp buffer to the 20%-of-capital trigger. TORNTPOWER's +3.28% continues to drive cluster performance (+₹1,947 on 6.13% position); ADANIPOWER extended to +0.70% (+₹342.70). Not fired.

trigger_h_new_open_orders.note: No new OPEN orders; ORDER HYGIENE prompt-layer effect still cannot be assessed — 6 consecutive ticks with zero order activity.

trigger_meta_strategy_silent_plus_mahaba.note: TWO of THREE meta-trigger components are TRUE (strategy silent, MAHABANK below -4.5%) but the third (book deteriorated below -0.5%) is FALSE — book is fractionally POSITIVE at +0.023%. Per 13:30 spec, this trigger fires to elevate risk_level to HIGH and recommend strategy_reviewer early-intervention. Does NOT fire — risk_level held at MEDIUM. However, note that the earlier META-TRIGGER from 13:30 (MAHABANK below -4.5% AND strategy stall >4h) remains in the fired state as a carryover audit flag.

trigger_new_aubank_above_plus_1_pct_unac.note: AUBANK +0.66% unrealized, +₹1,214.40. 34 bps from the +1.0% threshold. Strategy has not acted on +0.62% (13:17) or +0.66% (13:48). Not fired this tick, but continues to drift toward fire.

findings: MAHABANK priority-watch ELEVATED: -4.66% (13:17) → -4.91% (13:48), a -25 bps deterioration that set a FRESH DAY LOW and unwound the 13:17 partial recovery. Now only 9 bps from the -5% hard trigger for default_sl_pct tightening — the tightest proximity of the day. Mark-to-market loss -₹4,800 on 9.30% of capital. Trajectory is reverting to the pre-13:17 deterioration pattern. HIGH-PROBABILITY fire candidate for 14:30 tick.

Daily P&L FLIPPED POSITIVE for the 2nd time today: -₹269 (13:17) → +₹233 (13:48), a +₹502 swing. Notable because the positive swing happened DESPITE MAHABANK deteriorating -₹240 — offsetting gains were broad-based (8 of 10 holdings green this tick). This counter-MAHABANK dispersion means book-level risk is currently absorbing the single-name drag without stress. Buffer to -1% findings trigger: ₹10,235; to -3% loss gate: ₹30,239 (both expanded from 13:17 on the positive swing).

CARRY-OVER META-TRIGGER remains fired: strategy's hold-everything posture is materially failing ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt — MAHABANK still below -4.5% AND strategy stall >4h (now 4h45m). Persists as a first-class Day-2 EOD audit line item for strategy_reviewer. Not a numeric-lever fire (corrective surface is prompt layer per 2026-04-22 16:00 EOD review).

Strategy stall extends to 4h45m post-open on Day 2 (~23h45m cumulative since yesterday's 14:13:33 HINDUNILVR fill). 30 minutes to the 5-hour tertiary escalation at 14:15 IST. Four concrete at-cost-plus trim candidates unacted on at this tick: AUBANK +0.66% (widest of day), TORNTPOWER +3.28% (also widest of day), PNBHOUSING +1.95%, GRANULES +1.02% (fresh window this tick, up from +0.46%).

AUBANK single-name 18.58% of capital — passive BREACH of max_position_pct=0.15 by 3.58 pp (essentially flat, -1 bps from 18.59% at 13:17). Unrealized +0.66% (+₹1,214.40), widest at-cost-plus window of day. 34 bps from the +1.0% unacted-flag trigger. Still not acted on.
TORNTPOWER +3.28% — fresh day-best unrealized on this name (+4 bps from 13:17's +3.22%), +₹1,947 on a 6.13% position. Concrete trim opportunity the strategy continues to pass on.
GRANULES +1.02% — crossed above +1% this tick (was +0.46% at 13:17, a +₹266 swing). 4th at-cost-plus trim candidate to emerge today.

BFSI cluster 35.90% of capital / 45.70% of deployed — drifted DOWN 4 bps tick-over-tick (MAHABANK weakening offsetting modest AUBANK gains). 1.10 pp buffer to the 37% trigger. Cluster share is stabilizing in the 35.9%-36.0% corridor.

Power cluster 16.14% of capital / 20.55% of deployed — flat on capital basis, +1 bps on deployed basis. 3.86 pp buffer to the 20%-of-capital findings trigger. TORNTPOWER +3.28% continues to drive cluster cost-basis performance.

FMCG cluster 16.73% / 21.30% — essentially flat (-1 bps capital basis). NESTLEIND mild improvement (-0.38% → -0.28%) offset by HINDUNILVR modest move (+0.05% → +0.28%); net positive drift within cluster.

Deployed 78.56% of total value — 8.56 pp above the 0.70 max_deployed_pct cap (flat from 13:17's 78.55%). Cap remains binding against admissions. Sixth consecutive tick with cash unchanged at ₹214,415.50 and empty order book.
No intraday positions (paper_positions empty). All exposure is CNC holdings; no intraday-leverage exposure.
Overrides state (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70) correctly reflected in risk_config.yaml; 11:30 changelog entry remains the latest. Housekeeping consistent.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70 (posture unchanged since the 11:30 tightening, now 2h30m stable).

Carrying forward the 13:30 META-TRIGGER fire (MAHABANK below -4.5% + strategy stall >4h) as a first-class persistent Day-2 EOD audit line item for strategy_reviewer. Status unchanged: prompt-layer corrective surface, not a numeric lever.

Flagging MAHABANK as HIGHEST-PRIORITY fire candidate for 14:30 tick: 9 bps from the -5% hard trigger, trajectory actively deteriorating (25 bps this tick). If breached at 14:30, default_sl_pct tightens 0.02 → 0.015 per pre-specified plan.

Rationale for holding posture: spec-hard triggers for risk_config mutation remain not-fired. Trigger (e) MAHABANK: NOT fired (9 bps buffer). Trigger (a) unrealized: NOT fired (book positive, 1023 bps buffer). Trigger (d) BFSI: DRIFTED DOWN. Trigger (g) Power capital-basis: FLAT. The firing triggers — (f) stall, carryover meta-trigger — remain explicitly non-numeric per spec. Composite meta-trigger (silent+MAHABANK+deterioration) fails on (iii): book is positive. Spec discipline — 'no tightening without a specific firing numeric trigger' — intact.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02 → 0.015) despite MAHABANK at -4.91% / 9 bps from breach. Reason: the specified trigger is -5% BREACH, which has not occurred. Pre-firing the lever at priority-watch-escalated (not breach) violates the spec-driven discipline that has prevented over-adjustment throughout the session. Additionally, default_sl_pct applies only to NEW admissions, which the 0.70 deployed cap already blocks — tightening here would be no-op friction against an already-paused admission surface. Will fire cleanly at 14:30 if the breach occurs.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: book FLIPPED POSITIVE this tick (+₹233); trigger (a) moved AWAY from firing by +₹502. Current P&L is +0.023%, with ₹30,239 buffer to the -3% loss gate. Tightening a loss gate while the book is in positive territory and improving is plainly premature.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: the 8.56 pp existing binding gap already imposes hard SELL-before-BUY pressure. Zero SELL activity for 6 ticks running — adding 2 pp more friction against an already-paused admission surface is decorative.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK's 18.58% is grandfathered mark-to-market drift; a tighter cap cannot retract it and has no bite on future sizing that the deployed cap already blocks.
Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) NOT fired — BFSI DRIFTED DOWN 4 bps. Zero new entries this session means a stricter confidence gate has no admission surface to act on.

Did NOT elevate risk_level to HIGH. Reason: composite meta-trigger (silent + MAHABANK + book deteriorated) fails on component (iii) — book is POSITIVE at +0.023%, well above the -0.5% threshold. The single-name MAHABANK risk is real but the aggregate book is absorbing it. Keeping MEDIUM is the spec-consistent call; will revisit at 14:30 if MAHABANK breaches AND/OR book reverts negative.

Did NOT add a numeric response to the 4h45m strategy stall. Reason: trigger (f) explicitly specified as non-numeric per 12:00/12:30/13:00/13:30 specs. Corrective surface is the ORDER HYGIENE / CLUSTER DISCIPLINE prompt-layer additions from 2026-04-22 16:00.

Did NOT add a new numeric knob (e.g., max_working_orders_per_symbol, max_stale_hours, sector_cap_pct). Reason: no currently-firing trigger demonstrates existing parameters are ineffective. The current overrides (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70) are structurally working: BFSI drifting down, Power flat, deployed cap binding. The failure vector is behavioral (strategy not acting on visible exits), which the prompt layer addresses.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (e-PRIORITY-ARMED) If MAHABANK marks below -5.00% → FIRE: tighten default_sl_pct 0.02 → 0.015 AND add explicit SL-trim consideration to strategy-layer brief. Currently -4.91%, 9 bps to fire — HIGHEST-PROBABILITY fire of the session. If trajectory extends another 40+ bps (i.e., -5.31%+) consider second-knob-on-same-trigger: also tighten min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01. Conversely, if MAHABANK RECOVERS above -4.0% (unlikely but possible) → reset priority-watch.
(a) Unrealized P&L breaks below -1.0% (-₹10,002) → tighten daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer ₹10,235 (expanded from 13:17's ₹9,728 on the positive swing). Not fired.

(b) Strategy layer executes its FIRST SELL/EXIT → read the justification. If MAHABANK stop-out (priority-watch resolution), AUBANK at-cost-plus trim (oversize resolution), TORNTPOWER profit-take (Power cluster trim), GRANULES or PNBHOUSING trim → relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way, non-cumulative). Never above 0.75. If a NEW BUY on proceeds, verify against cap and only admit if non-BFSI/non-Power/non-FMCG.
(c) Strategy admits NEW BUY despite 0.70 cap → verify math; if 4th BFSI or 4th Power name, tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65.
(d) BFSI cluster climbs above 0.37 via mark OR new admission → tighten min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 35.90%, drifted DOWN this tick.

(f-ESCALATED) Strategy stall reaches 5 hours at 14:15 IST → re-evaluate meta-trigger escalation. If 14:30 tick shows still-silent + MAHABANK still in priority-watch + any negative book trajectory, elevate risk_level flag weight to HIGH for the 14:30 audit (still non-numeric lever, but escalate communication priority).
(g) Power cluster crosses 20% of CAPITAL (+3.86 pp from 16.14%) via mark OR new Power admission → findings flag only. The deployed-basis reading (20.55%) continues to slowly drift up.
(h) Any new OPEN BUY not self-cancelled within 15 min → first-ever observation of ORDER HYGIENE prompt fix (still no order activity in 6 ticks).

(meta-ARMED) If 14:30 tick shows ALL of: (i) strategy STILL silent, (ii) MAHABANK below -5.0% (breach), (iii) book below -0.5% → ELEVATE risk_level to HIGH AND fire default_sl_pct tightening AND recommend strategy_reviewer pre-EOD intervention. Currently 2 of 3 components hold; (iii) is the clear miss (book is positive).

(new-ARMED) If 14:00→14:30 tick shows AUBANK unrealized climb above +1.0% (~+₹1,845) AND still no SELL action → flag AUBANK as 'oversize-plus-gain-plus-unacted' (all three on single name) for strategy_reviewer. AUBANK at +0.66%, 34 bps from fire.

(new-ARMED) If 14:00→14:30 tick shows TORNTPOWER extending above +4.0% unrealized AND still no SELL → flag as second 'profit-plus-unacted' case; the Power cluster has a distinct trim candidate beyond the BFSI-focused AUBANK case. Currently +3.28%, 72 bps from fire.
(new) If GRANULES extends above +1.5% unrealized AND still no SELL → note as third concurrent profit-plus-unacted case this tick. Currently +1.02%, 48 bps from fire.
